description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior is predominantly light gray with large windows, especially on the rear facade, allowing for ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a well-manicured hedge and features a spacious green lawn at the back. The front of the house includes two garage doors, a central entryway, and a small landscaped area with shrubs. The side views reveal additional green spaces and privacy hedges, as well as a rooftop terrace or utility area. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a surrounding hedge, featuring garages and a spacious backyard lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing two garage doors, a central entryway, and landscaped shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hedge boundary, green spaces, and rooftop terrace area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a wide green lawn, and dense hedges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible windows, hedge enclosure, and additional green areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a flat overhang, flanked by two garage doors and minimal landscaping
